name: update_user
description: Update an existing user's profile information. You can modify their name, username, metadata, password, and other attributes. Only the fields you include in the request body will be updated; all other fields remain unchanged. Use this to change user roles (via metadata), reset passwords, or update profile information.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The Clerk user ID to update. Starts with 'user_'. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: public_metadata
parameters.description: Updated public metadata. This replaces the entire public_metadata object, so include all fields you want to keep.

parameters.name: private_metadata
parameters.description: Updated private metadata. This replaces the entire private_metadata object.

parameters.name: profile_image_id
parameters.description: ID of a previously uploaded image to set as the profile picture.
